top_signals.title: Ex-CIA agent created fake spy program to amass $40M gold stash: reports
top_signals.summary: David Rush allegedly brought at least two CIA colleagues on the fraudulent operation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hoekstra casts Canada as key US critical minerals partner
top_signals.summary: US Ambassador Pete Hoekstra outlined a vision of closer continental integration built on Canada's resource wealth, mining expertise and longstanding industrial ties with the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Almonty Industries raises $700M via note offering
top_signals.summary: Almonty Industries' share price sank by 18% on the potential dilution.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Sodium-ion batteries are not the end of lithium, but they may be the end of something else
top_signals.summary: Lithium solved a very real problem, offering energy density high enough to make modern portable electronics and electric vehicles commercially viable.

top_signals.title: US Elemental eyes Nasdaq debut as McDermitt lithium project advances
top_signals.summary: Project situated at the northern end of the McDermitt Caldera—a mineral-rich geological formation that hosts one of the world’s largest known accumulations of lithium mineralization.
